data.content: Plan review rejected. The current proposal only adds a submitted search prompt plus a numbered filtered menu. That is not sufficient for the stated acceptance criteria, which require real-time filtering while typing, full-list restoration when the query is cleared via backspace, and arrow-key selection from filtered results. Please revise the implementation plan to cover an incremental /dev/tty input loop with redraw behavior, specify how arrow keys and backspace are parsed, and add PTY-based validation for the interactive flow in both scripts. Pure helper tests are still useful, but they are not enough on their own for this TTY-driven UX.
